title: Atlantid Core — Layer License Matrix (C11) — REPLACEMENT CANDIDATE
description: REPLACEMENT_CANDIDATE (awaiting Gate B). Net-new Core schema for artifact C11 (requirement P3-REQ-ADD-006): a machine-readable rights matrix required in the customer package. For each layer it identifies source, rights holder or publisher, license or terms, permitted uses, redistribution posture, attribution requirement, share-alike requirement, modification posture, unresolved legal questions, and relationship to Atlantid Core. It records rights facts and declared unresolved questions; it draws NO legal conclusion. Counsel question 9 (ODbL derivative-database status) remains open and must be recorded, never resolved. Externally derived join tables and source-specific packs are marked as outside Core. Fail-closed.

draws_legal_conclusion.description: This matrix records rights facts and open questions only; it draws no legal conclusion (Ruling 2, counsel Q9 open).

layers.description: One entry per layer present in or associated with the package. The Core Shape A geometry layer is always present and always relationship_to_core = IS_CORE.

unresolved_legal_questions.description: Open questions recorded verbatim, never resolved here. For any layer implicating ODbL derivative-database status this MUST include counsel question 9.

relationship_to_core.description: Ruling 2 boundary: only rights-clean Core layers are IS_CORE. Source-specific packs and externally derived join tables are OUTSIDE_CORE.

allOf.$comment: A layer that is an externally derived join table may never be IS_CORE.
